briefs.title: BC Scraps Old Credit Union Deposit Guarantee Rules — What Depositors Should Know
briefs.summary: BC repealed the Credit Union Deposit Guarantee Regulation, the old rules governing how deposits at BC credit unions were protected. A newer framework under the Financial Institutions Act now governs deposit protection instead.
briefs.action_required: Check with your BC credit union to confirm your deposits are still fully protected under the current rules.
